title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Go library for pulling and running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other LLMs locally via Docker-like commands.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama HTTP API—works in Node, browsers, and edge runtimes.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio bindings for chatting, embedding, and pulling models from Ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama as a local LLM for chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI (React + FastAPI) that talks to any Ollama model; supports multi-user, RAG, and plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with builders, streaming, and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for chatting and embedding with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli-crystal
summary: Crystal-lang CLI and library for Ollama with type-safe models and built-in progress bars.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that routes GitHub Copilot calls to a local Ollama model for offline code completions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official multi-arch Docker images (CPU & CUDA) with one-command run instructions.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama and its CUDA runtime for reproducible local deployments.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate (reqwest-based) for Ollama with tokio streams and examples.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 community SDK for Ollama with System.Text.Json and IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack 2.0 pipelines.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Minimal Python Streamlit app that builds a RAG chatbot backed by Ollama and ChromaDB.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that answers questions using any local Ollama model with slash commands.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP library with GenServer behavior for managing Ollama models and chat sessions.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a local AI assistant pane powered by Ollama for note Q&A and summarization.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library for Ollama with cross-compilation support and zero-dependency HTTP.
